controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can Fan RVK, Phresh TEK Inline, Vortex S-Line
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling outlet switches fan on/off based on temperature setpoint with separate day/night setpoints. Max 14.5A total. APCL4X/APCL8X power expanders available for high-amp AC units. Heavy-duty moisture-protective outlet covers. 120V NEMA—transformer needed for 230V European use.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CLOUDLINE T4, Systemair RVK EC, Vents 125EC
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via cooling outlet; no 0-10V or PWM speed control signal available. EC fan speed remains fixed at its own controller setting.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Dr. Infrared DR-988, greenhouse tube heater, fan-forced heater
compatible_devices.notes: Heating outlet activates when temperature drops below setpoint. Separate day/night temperature setpoints. Data logger records min/max temperature.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.notes: Humidify/Dehumidify outlet in humidification mode; separate day/night RH setpoints. Data logger records min/max humidity.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.notes: Shared Humidify/Dehumidify outlet configured for dehumidification mode. Activates when RH exceeds setpoint. Cannot run humidifier and dehumidifier simultaneously.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CAP PPM-1, Blueprint BPCO2G, Titan Controls Ares 8
compatible_devices.notes: 4th outlet is a general-purpose Cycle Timer (not a dedicated CO2 outlet). Supports day-only, night-only, or 24h cycling with 1-second precision on/off intervals. No CO2 PPM sensor; purely timer-based. For PPM-controlled CO2, use APE4200 instead.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CO2 solenoid valve + regulator assembly, compressed CO2 tank system
compatible_devices.notes: Cycle Timer outlet can trigger CO2 solenoid valve; timer-based only with no PPM feedback. Day-only, night-only, or 24h cycle modes with 1-second precision.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot ECLIPSE F60 Digital Environmental Controller (APE4100)
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hydrofarm Active Air clip fan, Secret Jardin Monkey Fan, oscillating grow tent fan
compatible_devices.notes: Cycle Timer outlet is well-suited for running circulation fans in timed intervals. Configurable as day-only, night-only, or 24h operation with on/off intervals settable to 1-second precision. Primary intended use case for this outlet alongside CO2 cycling.
